inline_comments.message: No longer launching a Consul agent and creating service entries for CBS in this script.  Instead, move it to a Consul init container.   When components remove their dependency on a Consul lookup to find CBS, the Consul init container can be removed from the charts.

Jack - Are you referring to this https://git.onap.org/dcaegen2/deployments/tree/consul-loader-container?  Will CBS helm charts be updated to run this init container to do the required service registration?

Yes, that's the container I'm referring to.   I've updated the OOM chart for bootstrap to add this init container.  I'm testing with it locally.  I will submit the OOM changes after we have released the new bootstrap container.
Okay. Was considering CBS helm charts as service registration done currently is mainly for CBS, I suppose bootstrap is okay too (as long as entry is available prior to services being instantiated)
